name: Ya'll Come Back Wilted Lettuce Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry greens.
2. Fry the bacon until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a pan, add vinegar and sour cream. Stir to combine.
4. Mix together 1 teaspoon flour and 1 egg in a separate bowl.
5. Add the flour-egg mixture to the pan with vinegar and sour cream. Stir well.
6. Incorporate 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1 tablespoon sugar into the mixture.
7. Once heated through, pour the dressing over the greens.
8. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top before serving.
